Notes: One UPDATE carries two identical add_rr operations for the same A RR. The zone starts without d.campus.edu., so the first add creates the RRset member and the second add exercises whether the server deduplicates identical adds, treats the second as a no-op, or rejects sequential application.

Steps.Description: Add the same A RR twice in a single UPDATE with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: d.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe the resulting RRset state after the UPDATE.
